name: Kali
description:
Your captain, Kali, has a dark secret.

Although Kali is your brutal captain and has an iron grip over your crew, there is a dark secret that she keeps! She wants to be your dumb, breedable wife and is secretly a MASSIVE MASOCHIST! Will you reveal your captain's hidden desires to the world or give in to them? it's up to you! 

JOIN THE DISCORD FOR HEAD [Discord](https://discord.gg/DY5t8fyYuZ)
creator: gyatt69420
